key_insights: India highest LinkedIn apply rate: 19.14% (median 19.0%), ~2.2x global average
US leads volume (23,539 jobs), 9.14% avg apply rate, 81.77 avg views per job
Saturday best day to post globally (9.25%), Sunday 2nd (8.9%)
December elevated apply rates across all markets (US: 14.67%, UK: 10.9%)
Posting duration near-zero correlation with apply rate (-0.01) -- short rotations effective
Software Engineer highest-volume title (5,555 jobs), 458.68 avg views per posting
Warehouse Associate highest apply rate among top titles at 14.95%
UAE 16.34% apply rate, overweighted in ROI allocation
97.43% applications via ATS, 2.57% LinkedIn native apply
500 slots can serve 2,500-3,000 jobs/day with timezone rotation across 76 countries
LinkedIn peak apply hours: 8-10am and 5-7pm local time per country
Dataset: 108,871 total jobs across 76 countries and 2,121 standardized titles
Easy Apply vs ATS: 17.7% vs 8.7% apply rate (2.3x lift), 205 vs 0.1 avg applications (ATS doesn't report to LinkedIn)
Software Engineer Easy Apply: 1,109 avg applications, 23.1% apply rate vs ATS: 0 applications, 9.7% rate
Joveo LinkedIn Recruiter account: 16.1% apply rate (5.9% above 10.2% benchmark), 9M views, 1.4M clicks in Q1 2026

easy_apply_vs_ats_summary.insight: Easy Apply delivers 2.3x higher apply rates and 2000x more tracked applications. ATS jobs show 0 in LinkedIn reports because applications happen off-platform.

joveo_account_benchmarks.insight: Joveo account runs 5.9% above LinkedIn Staffing benchmark (16.1% vs 10.2%). Easy Apply jobs drive the majority of this outperformance.
